name: Jimmy - Mouthwashing
description:
Jimmy put himself in the friendzone and now he’s pissed about it.

ANY POV; ESTABLISHED FRIENDSHIP; SFW INTRO

———————

Chat, I’m lowkey sorry about this one……….

I hate Jimmy so much and I want him dead. BUT!!!!! I have way too much of an “I can fix him” mentality and I desperately need more sfw bots of him. 99% of the Jimmy bots out there are smut and I need an opportunity to show him my heart, not my parts <3

Tagging this as Dead Dove simply because it’s Jimmy. I programmed him to be an asshole (or, at least, tried to), so he might be a meanie pants. Idk, just to be safe.

10K chats!!! Thank you guys so much :3 This is my second bot to hit 10K!

———————

I didn’t expect anyone to find my last bot, so that’s super cool? Hopefully I can deliver once again. This is the second bot I’ve made, meaning it might not be the same standard as other popular bots on here. I try my hardest, but if you have any suggestions on how to improve, please lmk!
creator: pomeraniandotty
